subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been revealed by the Lord of Names unto him who hath hearkened unto the Call, turned toward the Most Exalted Horizon, and hath borne witness unto that which hath been witnessed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله مالک الاسماء لمن سمع الندآء و اقبل الی الافق الاعلی و شهد بما شهد
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God
